aws_sns_topic_arn.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon SNS (SNS) topic to which notifications are pushed.

aws_sns_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that has permissions to publish messages to the SNS topic.

sf_aws_iam_user_arn.description: ARN for the Snowflake IAM user created for your account.

sf_aws_external_id.description: External ID for the Snowflake IAM user created for your account.
